    "Pneumatic pressure test conducted without establishing a mandatory exclusion zone",
    "Severe safety hazard due to stored energy in compressed gas"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Immediately halt the pneumatic pressure test and depressurize the system safely",
    "Evacuate the immediate area and establish a secure physical exclusion zone with barricades and warning signs",
    "Verify all non-essential personnel are cleared to a safe distance calculated based on stored energy levels before resuming"
  ],
  "rationale": "Pneumatic testing involves a high level of stored energy. Conducting a pneumatic test without a designated exclusion zone violates basic safety protocols and ASME B31.3 requirements for safe pressure testing, posing an immediate threat to life and safety.",

    "ASME PCC-2 Article 501"
  ]
